document.title: MI97-04247C ASSY COVER-A1_REAR_COVER_ASSY
document.documentType: Supplier part approval package, control plan, work instruction, inspection sheet, and packaging specification

sourceSummary.oneLine: Supplier approval and manufacturing/inspection documentation for ASSY COVER-A1_REAR_COVER_ASSY, material code MI97-04247C, used on 2G/second-generation detector assemblies.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Supports supplier approval, process quality control, work instruction, outgoing inspection, and packaging requirements for the rear cover assembly.
keyPoints: Main approval sheet lists material code MI97-04247C, revision 00, description ASSY COVER-A1_REAR_COVER_ASSY, model 2세대 디텍터, vendor ㈜ 대일정공, and E.D DATE 2022-01-13.
EC history records Rev. 00 dated 22.01.13 with comment 신규 승인 and ECO number MIH2022007E.
Control plan identifies SOP category, part name ASSY COVER-A1_REAR_COVER_ASSY, SEC Part No. MI97-04247C, manufacture code DXPG/대일정공, and Date(Orig.) 2022.01.07.
Inspection requirements include gap, protrusion, magnet orientation, WIFI_ANT condition, bonding, label, power knob operation, appearance, and maximum rear cover assembly weight of 822.2 g.
Packaging specification lists item REAR COVER, item code MI97-04247C, model 2G 디텍터, material AL7075, date 2022.01.05, and package quantities.

evidence.claim: Outer cover antenna and LED gaps must be 0.3 mm or less.
evidence.evidenceText: REAR COVER와 OUTER COVER_ANT 간 좌/우 GAP 측정 기준 : 0.3mm 이하 일 것; REAR COVER와 OUTER COVER_LED 간 좌/우 GAP 측정 기준 : 0.3mm 이하 일 것

evidence.claim: MAGNET_N and MAGNET_S must not protrude relative to the rear cover.
